workflow.name: CV Job Matcher — dev.bg

options.systemPromptTemplate: Extract the candidate profile from this CV text. For job_type use ONE of: Backend, Frontend, Fullstack, QA. For experience_level use: Junior (0-2 years), Mid (2-5 years), Senior (5-10 years), Lead (10+ years). Extract all technical skills, languages, frameworks, and tools. For spoken_languages extract all human languages mentioned (e.g. English, Bulgarian, German) — include any language with a proficiency level mentioned in the CV.

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

assignments.name: scoring_text
assignments.value:
={{ "=== CV PROFILE ===
Skills: " + $("Build dev.bg Target URL").first().json.cv_profile.skills.join(", ") + "
Programming Languages: " + $("Build dev.bg Target URL").first().json.cv_profile.programming_languages.join(", ") + "
Frameworks: " + $("Build dev.bg Target URL").first().json.cv_profile.frameworks.join(", ") + "
Tools: " + $("Build dev.bg Target URL").first().json.cv_profile.tools.join(", ") + "
Spoken Languages: " + $("Build dev.bg Target URL").first().json.cv_profile.spoken_languages.join(", ") + "
Experience Level: " + $("Build dev.bg Target URL").first().json.cv_profile.experience_level + "
Years: " + $("Build dev.bg Target URL").first().json.cv_profile.years_of_experience + "
Previous Roles: " + $("Build dev.bg Target URL").first().json.cv_profile.job_titles.join(", ") + "

=== JOB LISTING ===
Title: " + $json.title + "
Company: " + $json.company + "
Location: " + $json.location + "
Type: " + $json.employment_type + "
Description: " + $json.description }}

parameters.jsonSchemaExample: {"score": 78, "matched_skills": ["Node.js", "PostgreSQL", "REST API"], "missing_skills": ["Angular", "HTML", "CSS"], "experience_match": true, "summary": "Силно backend съвпадение — full-stack позиция, липсва frontend опит"}

options.systemPromptTemplate: You are a job matching expert. Given a CV profile and job listing, score the percentage of JOB requirements that the candidate covers (0-100). RULES: Do NOT exclude jobs for having extra requirements — show them with lower scores. matched_skills = requirements the candidate has. missing_skills = requirements the candidate lacks. Spoken Languages (e.g. English, Bulgarian) listed under 'Spoken Languages' in the CV profile are confirmed — do NOT list them as missing_skills. Write the summary in Bulgarian in one sentence.

parameters.subject: ={{ "CV Job Matcher — " + $("Build Final Response").first().json.total + " подходящи обяви намерени" }}
parameters.message:
={{ "

Намерихме " + $("Build Final Response").first().json.total + " подходящи обяви!

    " + $("Build Final Response").first().json.jobs.map(function(j) { return "
  • " + j.title + " — " + j.company + "
    Съвпадение: " + j.score + "%
    " + (j.summary || "") + "
    Виж обявата →
    • "; }).join("") + "
" }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: false, error: 'UNREADABLE_CV', message: 'Не можахме да прочетем CV-то. Уверете се, че PDF файлът съдържа текст, а не е сканирано изображение.' } }}
={{ { success: true, jobs: [], total: 0, processed_at: $now.toISO(), message: 'Не намерихме обяви, отговарящи на критериите. Опитайте с по-широки предпочитания или по-голям брой дни.' } }}

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

parameters.jsCode:
const jobs = $('Parse Count').first().json.page1_jobs || [];
return [{ json: { jobs } }];

const jobs = $input.first().json.jobs || [];
return [{ json: { output: { jobs } } }];

workflow.description: CV Job Matcher — scrapes dev.bg job listings, parses CV with AI, scores each job vs. the candidate profile, and returns ranked results with match percentages.

triggerInfo:
This workflow has the following trigger(s):


Webhook trigger(s):


				<trigger 1>
					 - Node name: Receive CV Upload
					 - Base URL: http://localhost:5678/
					 - Production path: /webhook/cv-job-matcher
					 - Test path: /webhook-test/cv-job-matcher
					 - HTTP Method: POST
					 - Response Mode: Webhook is configured to respond using "Respond to Webhook" node.
					 - No credentials required for this webhook.
				</trigger 1>
